title: Fermented Bean Dutch Stir-fry
description: A chewy and fermented dish featuring dark soy sauce and broiled elements for a diabetic-friendly Dutch meal.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fermented black beans
ingredients.notes: Ensure to use quality, not necessarily fresh

ingredients.name: 2 tbsp dark soy sauce
ingredients.notes: Regular or low sodium versions can be used

instructions: Add fermented black beans and dark soy sauce to a baking dish.
Drizzle juice from the lime over the mixture and toss gently with tongs or spatula.
Place in preheated oven for 10 minutes until lightly browned on top.
Remove from oven, sprinkle minced garlic evenly across surface of bean mixture before returning to oven for another 5 minutes.
Gently stir ingredients together after removing from the oven and serve immediately.
